content: MEI annual revenue limit is R$ 81,000 (R$ 6,750/month) unchanged since 2019. In opening year, limit is proportional: R$ 6,750 x remaining months including opening month. MEI Caminhoneiro (CNAE 4930-2/01 and 4930-2/02) has higher limit of R$ 251,600/year. Mixed activities (commerce+services) share the same R$ 81k limit—DAS cost is higher but limit is the same.
